Motion To Reconsider Order On Mtn To Compel And Sanctions Award
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ERNESTO CABULOY'S Motion To Reconsider Order On Defendants' Motion to Compel and Sanctions Award.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Plaintiffs' motion for reconsideration is denied.

Counsel for the defendants is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and attaches the Judge Pro Tem's report.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

Appearances:
Dwight Cooper, esq. (415-610-6909) of Appellate Law Group for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Erica Williams, esq. (415-267-4037) of Dentons for Defendant/opposing party.

PLAINTIFF ERNESTO CABULOY's Motion To Reconsider Order On Mtn To Compel And Sanctions Award is continued to January 2, 2020 at 9:30 am in Department 302, Law and Motion Department.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Erica Williams, Esq. of Dentons US LLP, T:415.267.4037, for defendant and moving party;
No appearance by self-represented plaintiff Ernesto Cabuloy.

Defendant's counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The tentative ruling required the parties to appear at the hearing. There being no appearance by plaintiff, DEFENDANTS ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY, JOHN LELAND CORPORATION, JOHN LELAND's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production is GRANTED.

Order signed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
